description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Lint and build regularly that runs on push to specific branches and paths, on manual dispatch, and on a daily schedule. The workflow should have four jobs: lint_cpp, build_cpp, build_and_lint_go, and build_java. The lint_cpp job lints C++ code in a container. The build_cpp job builds C++ code in multiple OS and compiler configurations. The build_and_lint_go job builds and lints Go code. The build_java job builds Java code in multiple Java versions.
